Author: kk-triplesix
Name: QuestieBestie
Description:
The ultimate blue quest companion.

- Track all feature unlock quests with filters by expansion, class, location, and type
- See what each quest unlocks: dungeons, trials, raids, jobs, features
- Recursive prerequisite trees with MSQ cutoff
- Custom tracking lists with in-game overlay
- Aether Current tracker and Duty Unlock checklist
- Side quest tracker with special highlighting
- Statistics, favorites, notes, route planner, chat links
- Fully customizable overlay with colors, transparency, and font scale
- Multi-language support (EN/DE/FR/JP)

Commands:
/questie - Toggle main window
/questie overlay - Toggle overlay
/questie widget - Toggle progress widget
/questie search <name> - Search quest
Punchline: The ultimate blue quest companion. Track every unlock, plan your route, never miss a feature.
